carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Underwriter: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. acting for TMHCC(CI) – Travel SP 1 (Cayman Islands). Administered by WorldTrips, a subsidiary of Tokio Marine HCC. Document is a 'Description of Coverage' (equivalent to Certificate). Master Policy No. CI25-VS-1.
exact_language: This Description of Coverage is a summary of the provisions contained in Master Policy No. CI25-VS-1... The master policy has been issued by TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. acting on behalf of and for the account of TMHCC (CI) – Travel SP 1

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: VisitorSecure is a SCHEDULED BENEFIT plan, not a comprehensive major medical plan. All benefits are fixed dollar amounts per service (e.g., $1,450-$2,585/day hospital, $3,600-$7,800/surgery session). Benefits do NOT cover actual hospital bills. This is fundamentally different from percentage-of-cost plans like Patriot America Plus.
exact_language: Hospital Room & Board, including miscellaneous unless specified: $1,450 per day, 30 days max [Plan A] / $2,585 per day, 30 days max [Plan D] / Surgery: $3,600 per session [Plan A] / $7,800 per session [Plan D]
flag: CRITICAL: Scheduled benefit plan. Dollar limits per service are far below actual US hospital charges. High out-of-pocket risk for serious illness/injury.

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
section: Schedule of Benefits — OVERALL POLICY MAXIMUM

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
exact_language: Ages 14 days -59 years $0, $50, or $100 / Ages 60-69 years $0, $50, or $100 / Ages 70-79 years $100 or $200 / Ages 80 and above $100 or $200

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
benefit: Hospital Room and Board — Daily Cap
conclusion: Hospital Room & Board: $1,450/day (Plan A) to $2,585/day (Plan D), maximum 30 days. US hospital rates commonly exceed $3,000-$5,000/day, so this cap creates significant out-of-pocket exposure.
section: Schedule of Benefits — INPATIENT TREATMENT — Hospital Room & Board
exact_language: Hospital Room & Board, including miscellaneous unless specified: $1,450 per day, 30 days max [Plan A] / $1,725 per day, 30 days max [Plan B] / $2,000 per day, 30 days max [Plan C] / $2,585 per day, 30 days max [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: ICU: $2,200/day (Plan A) to $3,800/day (Plan D), maximum 8 days. US ICU rates commonly exceed $10,000+/day, creating very high out-of-pocket exposure.
section: Schedule of Benefits — INPATIENT TREATMENT — Intensive Care Unit
exact_language: Intensive Care Unit, including miscellaneous unless specified: $2,200 per day, 8 days max [Plan A] / $3,800 per day, 8 days max [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Surgery: $3,600/session (Plan A) to $7,800/session (Plan D). Major US surgeries commonly cost $30,000-$100,000+, creating very high out-of-pocket exposure.
section: Schedule of Benefits — INPATIENT TREATMENT — Surgery
exact_language: Surgery $3,600 per session [Plan A] $4,800 per session [Plan B] $6,000 per session [Plan C] $7,800 per session [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: ER: $375 (Plan A) to $785 (Plan D) per visit. For illness, must result in hospitalization as inpatient. No per-service cap stated for injury.
section: Schedule of Benefits — OUTPATIENT TREATMENT — Emergency Room
exact_language: Emergency Room (for illness, must result in hospitalization as inpatient) $375 [Plan A] $485 [Plan B] $600 [Plan C] $785 [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Diagnostic X-ray and Labs: $500 base + $400 for one CAT Scan/MRI/PET (Plan A); $750 base + $650 one CAT/MRI/PET (Plan D). Severe limitation vs actual MRI/CT costs ($1,000-$5,000+).
section: Schedule of Benefits — OUTPATIENT TREATMENT — Diagnostic X-ray and Labs
exact_language: Diagnostic X-ray and Labs: $500, plus $400 for one CAT Scan, MRI or PET [Plan A] / $750, plus $650 for one CAT Scan, MRI or PET [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Outpatient Prescription Drugs: $150 (Plan A) to $300 (Plan D) per period of insurance. Very limited.
section: Schedule of Benefits — OUTPATIENT TREATMENT — Outpatient Prescription Drugs
exact_language: Outpatient Prescription Drugs $150 [Plan A] $200 [Plan B] $250 [Plan C] $300 [Plan D]

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Physical Therapy: $40 per visit, 1 visit per day, maximum 12 visits per period. Same cap across all plans.
section: Schedule of Benefits — MISCELLANEOUS — Physical Therapy
exact_language: Physical Therapy $40 per visit, 1 visit per day, maximum 12 visits

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Acute Onset: up to plan maximum ($50K-$130K depending on plan) for eligible medical expenses. Emergency Medical Evacuation for acute onset: $25,000 lifetime max. Available for members under age 70.
section: Schedule of Benefits — MISCELLANEOUS — Acute Onset of Pre-existing Condition
exact_language: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Condition: $50,000 Lifetime Maximum for Eligible Medical Expenses [Plan A] / $130,000 Lifetime Maximum for Eligible Medical Expenses [Plan D] / $25,000 Lifetime Maximum for Emergency Medical Evacuation

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Conditions: Acute onset must not be chronic/congenital; Treatment within 24 hours; under age 70; not traveling against medical advice; not traveling to seek treatment; must be outside Home Country.
exact_language: (a) The Acute onset of a Pre-Existing Condition does not directly or indirectly relate to a chronic condition or congenital condition; (b) Treatment must be obtained within twenty-four (24) hours of the sudden and unexpected outbreak or reoccurrence; (c) You must be under seventy (70) years of age; ... (f) You must be traveling outside your Home Country

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: Emergency Medical Evacuation: $50,000 lifetime maximum. ONLY available for members under age 70. Significantly lower than most competitor plans ($1,000,000).
section: Schedule of Benefits — OTHER BENEFITS — Emergency Medical Evacuation
exact_language: $50,000 Lifetime Maximum, except as provided under Acute Onset of Pre-existing Condition. Available only to members under age 70.

carrier: TMHCC (CI) Insurance SPC Ltd. (Tokio Marine HCC)
conclusion: UnitedHealthcare Options PPO network confirmed for USA. Network name explicitly stated on ID card. No in-network vs out-of-network benefit differential stated in Description of Coverage — scheduled benefit amounts apply regardless.
exact_language: Plan Name: UnitedHealthcare Options PPO / Member Insurance: UnitedHealthcare / Provider UnitedHealthcare Member ID
flag: Network confirmed from Atlas America ID card (same WorldTrips/TMHCC product family). Verify VisitorSecure uses same network.
